description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low fence and features a landscaped yard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and several trees and shrubs. The front of the house includes a covered entryway with steps, a metal gate, and a driveway with parked cars. The rear and side yards are well-maintained, with green lawns and a mix of paved and grassy areas. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and outdoor living space.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a driveway and multiple parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, metal gate, and landscaped yard with a pool and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, additional parked cars, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio seating, and more of the green space and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the plain exterior wall, trees, and the edge of the property fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, metal gate, and a simple modern door, flanked by windows and a small porch area.
